description: List Checklist Item Response Sets for a specified Company.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[active]
parameters.description: If true, returns item(s) with a status of 'active'.

name.description: The name of the Item Response Set

active.description: Indicates whether an Item Response Set is available for use.

created_at.description: Represents when an Item Response Set was created

updated_at.description: Represents when a Item Response Set was last updated

in_use.description: Indicates whether a Response Set is being used by an Inspection Template Item

deletable.description: Indicates whether a Response Set is deletable.

procore_standard.description: Indicates whether a Response Set is a Procore standard set.
